scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n web,api,admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @realworkstudio/web && npm run build -w @realworkstudio/api && npm run build -w @realworkstudio/admin
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @realworkstudio/web && npm run lint -w @realworkstudio/api && npm run lint -w @realworkstudio/admin
